questions.q: Why did an Alberta judge quash a petition calling for a referendum on the province's separation in May 2026?
options: The provincial government failed in its duty to consult with First Nations
The petition did not gather the required 500,000 signatures
The proposed referendum question was overly vague
Separation violates the Canadian Charter of Rights and Freedoms
questions.correctText: The provincial government failed in its duty to consult with First Nations

questions.q: Which messaging app warned in May 2026 that it would pull out of Canada entirely if made to comply with a new lawful access bill?
According to a May 2026 discussion paper, the Carney government signaled it is open to divesting or selling which type of critical Canadian infrastructure?
In May 2026, sources revealed Prime Minister Mark Carney was set to announce a long-delayed national strategy regarding what sector?
A May 2026 report by RBC issued a stark warning that what Canadian industry could completely disappear by 2040?
